description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the electronuserland/builder:wine Docker image with a global before_script that runs yarn install and a global cache of node_modules/ and .yarn. Define three stages (test, build, deploy) and a test job in the test stage that executes yarn run lint then yarn run test. Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs only on the master branch, performs apt-get update, installs software-properties-common, adds the Flatpak PPA, installs flatpak and flatpak-builder, sets ELECTRON_CACHE and ELECTRON_BUILDER_CACHE environment variables, runs yarn run release, removes the wine cache directory, caches node_modules keyed by yarn.lock and Electron caches keyed by electron-builder.json, and publishes the dist/* directory as an artifact that never expires. Include a pages job also in the deploy stage that runs only for the pages pipeline, creates a .public directory, copies all files into it, renames it to public, and stores the public folder as a Pages artifact. No additional services are required.
